name: sprint-capacity-planner
description: YouTrack App: Sprint Capacity Planner for the AppGlass team. Adds capacity planning, computed metrics and a one-click next-Sprint button on top of native YouTrack Sprints.

scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:widgets
scripts.test:e2e:demo: playwright test --config playwright.demo.config.ts && ANALYZE_BASE=artifacts/demo node scripts/analyze-ui-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/render-reels.mjs
scripts.demo:real: SCP_SUBTITLES_DIR=artifacts/real-demo/subtitles playwright test --config playwright.real-demo.config.ts && REELS_BASE=real-demo node scripts/render-reels.mjs && node .claude/skills/demo-video-review/scripts/analyze-video.mjs artifacts/real-demo/reels artifacts/real-demo/subtitles --out artifacts/real-demo/reels/video-review.md
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run typecheck:all && npm run test:unit && npm run test:contract && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:demo
